calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-26-2018 Off Calendar

Plaintiffs Notice, Motion, Application For And Request For Default Prove-Up Hearing And Entry Of Default Judgment
Off Calendar Apr-10-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Broadway Properties, LLC.
Dept. 514. Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Plaintiff Jonathan Herschel Bornstein, Esq. was present in pro per, placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Braodway Properties, LLC
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on May 7, 2013.
Default was entered against defendant on June 15, 2013.
DOE defendants were dismissed on December 21, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Jonathan Herschel Bornstein, and against the Defaulted Defendant Broadway Properties, LLC, as follows:

Damages - $39,861.61.
Prejudgment Interest - $19,286.46.
Costs - $725.25.

Total - $59,873.32.

Proposed judment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
